d4eb7130-6cec-40f2-80d2-42347af97087.text:
Entity: Order

Purpose:
Represents a customer's order.

JPQL Entity Name:
Order

Fields

- id
- description
- paidAmount
- createdDate

Relationships

ManyToOne

field:
user

target:
User

JPQL:

JOIN o.user u

OneToOne

field:
orderUsageDetails

target:
OrderUsage

JPQL:

JOIN o.orderUsageDetails ou

Examples

All orders

SELECT o
FROM Order o

Revenue

SELECT SUM(o.paidAmount)
FROM Order o

Revenue by user

SELECT u.username,
SUM(o.paidAmount)
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o
GROUP BY u.username

Never use

orderItems
orderUsage
usage

b1f235ec-5dfb-480f-b7ee-3d3c7f1eab0e.text:
JPQL Rules

Always use JPQL.

Never use SQL.

Never use table names.

Never use database column names.

Always use JPA entity names.

Always use JPA property names.

The following properties DO NOT exist:

orderUsage
orderItems
orders
userOrders

The correct property names are:

orderList
orderUsageDetails
user
order

0afeceb3-0b7b-4462-ad43-e8bac7a3a06a.text:
Business Metrics

Revenue

SUM(o.paidAmount)

Expense

SUM(ou.costPrice)

Net Earnings

SUM(o.paidAmount)-SUM(ou.costPrice)

Revenue by User

SELECT
u.username,
SUM(o.paidAmount)
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o
GROUP BY u.username

Net Earnings by User

SELECT
u.username,
SUM(o.paidAmount)-SUM(ou.costPrice)
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o
JOIN o.orderUsageDetails ou
GROUP BY u.username

68daa69b-177d-40be-82db-df84ba34710a.text:
Entity: OrderUsage

Purpose

Stores AI resource usage.

JPQL Entity Name

OrderUsage

Fields

- id
- usageDetails
- costPrice
- createdDate

Relationships

OneToOne

field:
order

target:
Order

JPQL

JOIN ou.order o

Examples

Costs

SELECT SUM(ou.costPrice)
FROM OrderUsage ou

Net earnings

SELECT
u.username,
SUM(o.paidAmount)-SUM(ou.costPrice)
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o
JOIN o.orderUsageDetails ou
GROUP BY u.username

Never use

orderItems
orderUsage
orderUsages

f975b66b-deb5-4252-91e2-3a7bb699ff73.text:
Entity: User

Purpose:
Stores registered users.

JPQL Entity Name:
User

Fields:
- id (Long, Primary Key)
- username (String)
- email (String)
- createdDate (LocalDateTime)

Relationships:

OneToMany

field:
orderList

target entity:
Order

JPQL usage:

SELECT u
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o

Examples

Get all users

SELECT u
FROM User u

Get usernames

SELECT u.username
FROM User u

Get users with orders

SELECT u.username, o.paidAmount
FROM User u
JOIN u.orderList o

Never use:

orders
userOrders
orderItems
